topic.topic: When do multi-agent systems outperform single-agent systems?

primitive_definitions.name: system

primitive_definitions.why_primitive: It is the unit of intervention.

primitive_definitions.definition: A problem the system attempts to solve.

assumptions.rationale: The baseline frames research as improvement.
assumptions.possible_failure: Metric gains may not explain mechanisms.

mechanism_model.mechanism_summary: A generic method-improvement mechanism with limited causal detail.

tensions.statement: The topic may need better performance, but the mechanism is under-specified.
tensions.why_it_matters: Weak mechanisms make experiments less decisive.
